payload.answer: SQL admin access is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. The requested query was not executed.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable user memory should be created from an admin SQL/debug command.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in the appropriate secure environment before attempting admin SQL access.
Use supported non-SQL admin/debug endpoints if available.
